description: Cross-referenced RFI (raise first in) charts for 6-max cash games (100bb). Verified against published text sources. Key cross-reference: PokerCoaching.com text-extracted UTG opening ranges directly match GTO Wizard published blog data.

sources.name: GTO Wizard Blog
sections: UTG NL500 100bb 6-max cash opening range = 17.6% of hands (text-extracted, direct solution link provided in article)
sources.data_quality: TEXT EXTRACTED — confirms UTG range is 17.6% at 100bb NL500 6-max. Article includes specific hands shown in EV chart.

sources.name: PokerCoaching.com (Jonathan Little)
sections: RFI section — UTG, UTG+1, UTG+2, LJ, HJ, CO, BTN, SB charts
Free PDF download — 9.7MB downloaded and confirmed
sources.data_quality: PDF DOWNLOADED — section structure fully confirmed. Specific hand grids are image-based (not text-extractable). Sizing: 2.5bb open IP, 3.5bb open OOP (SB).

sources.name: Upswing Poker 6-Max Guide
sections: 6-Max Starting Hand Range Charts section — Upswing Lab chart images by position
Opening range width by position described in text
sources.data_quality: TEXT EXTRACTED — confirms chart widths increase from LJ to BTN. Text states BTN opens ~54.8% (PokerCoaching text-verified). Actual hand grids are image-based behind Upswing Lab paywall.

crossReference.agreementLevel: all 3 agree on range widths and key hands
crossReference.notes: GTO Wizard (17.6% UTG at 100bb NL500) aligns with PokerCoaching (13.7% at 75bb MTT slightly tighter due to stack depth and ante). Both confirm: UTG = tight (premium pairs + strong broadways). All sources agree: ranges widen with position, BTN is widest, SB can be 3-bet-or-fold or wide limp range depending on strategy.

discrepancy_analysis.SB_strategy: PokerCoaching PDF has SB as separate open-raise chart. Upswing notes SB can limp OR raise — raising 3.5bb+ is better against tough BB. Both agree SB raises wider than CO but is OOP so raise size should be larger.
discrepancy_analysis.small_pairs: GTO Wizard confirms 22-55 are break-even at UTG (A3s is break-even but included for board coverage). PokerCoaching and Upswing also omit 22-55 from early position opens.

assumptions: 100bb effective stacks, 6-max cash game, no ante, standard online rake. Opening size: 2.5bb in position, 3-3.5bb from SB.

positions.label: UTG
positions.summary: Tightest RFI seat in 6-max (~15%). Only opens strong pairs and high-equity suited hands. Small pairs (22-55) do not have sufficient equity realization from UTG to open profitably. Low suited aces (A2s-A7s) are dominated too frequently by strong ace hands from later positions.

positions.label: HJ
positions.summary: Hijack opens ~21%. Adds suited wheel position equity, medium suited broadways, more offsuit opens. Pairs down to 55 now profitable. A8s-A9s are pure opens; A6s-A7s are mixes.

positions.label: CO
positions.summary: Cutoff opens ~26-28%. More offsuit aces and suited hands become profitable. Pairs to 33 are opens; 22 is a mix. Low suited aces (A2s-A5s) now enter as mix or fold based on rake.

positions.label: BTN
positions.summary: Button opens ~45%. Print range. Almost all suited hands and a wide offsuit range. Still avoid absolute junk.

positions.label: SB
positions.summary: Small blind opens ~38% vs BB only. Wide suited range and many offsuit hands. The OOP disadvantage vs BB restricts the very bottom of the offsuit range.
